description: For almost all of recorded history, even tool-using history, humanity had not harnessed lightning, and most of the Fair Folk still have little understanding of electrical devices.  This ability gives you an almost-instinctive understanding of circuits, however, allowing you to develop the electronics skill normally and providing a bonus to its use.
You have developed an intuitive understanding of computers.  You can develop the computer skill normally and gain a bonus to its use.
While some warrior societies or groups of the Wise may have secret runic codes, wide-scale writing has not yet been invented.  You cannot read.
